baseline.observed: collect_from_source built the full matching file list before applying the prompt limit, so a limit of 1 still counted every matching file in the source.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because summary.files_seen was 5 instead of 1.

selected_candidate.name: Lazy source file walk for limited scans
selected_candidate.reason: Make smoke-test limits reduce file traversal work instead of only limiting parsed prompt output.
selected_candidate.success_metric: remaining=1 stops after one prompt file in a temp source, real codex --limit 1 reports files_seen=1, and full local checks still pass.

safety_controls: The change is limited to src-tauri/src/lib.rs.
WalkDir uses sort_by_file_name for deterministic traversal.
Full scans still walk every matching file.
Focused RED/GREEN tests and a real codex --limit 1 smoke were run.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
